title: lobelia gloria-montis subsp. longibracteata
intro: Lobelia gloria-montis subsp. longibracteata is a subspecies of the Lobelia gloria-montis plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is also known as Lobelia longibracteata and is a South American species that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The Lobelia gloria-montis subsp. longibracteata plant has been reported to have expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be taken to alleviate respiratory problems and provide relief from coughs and congestion.
